title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Xpressbees

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Xpressbees
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Xpressbees. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!
